summary: Comprehensive testing of Meilisearch global search feature completed. All search APIs working correctly: typeahead with live results, full search with filters, typo tolerance ('labredor' finds 'Labrador'), synonym support, and admin reindex endpoint. Frontend search bar and search results page fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: search_service.py correctly uses meilisearch-python-sdk v5.7.0 with keyword arguments (not opt_params)
Typo tolerance configured: 1 typo for 4+ char words, 2 typos for 8+ char words
Synonyms configured for pet-related terms (dog/doggy/pup, treat/snack, labrador/lab, etc.)
Products index has 392 products indexed with searchable attributes: name, description, tags, category, collection_names, variant_options
Filterable attributes: category, collection_ids, tags, price, available, is_pan_india_shippable, autoship_enabled
SearchBar.jsx uses debounced typeahead with 300ms delay
SearchResults.jsx has category, price range, pan_india, and autoship filters
seed_data_creation: 392 products and 22 collections indexed in Meilisearch on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meilisearch search feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/search?q=query (full search with filters), GET /api/search/typeahead?q=query (fast autocomplete), GET /api/search/stats (index stats), POST /api/search/reindex (admin only). Typo tolerance and synonyms working correctly.

backend_api_tests.test_typeahead_returns_products_and_coll: PASS - Returns products and collections for 'cake' query
backend_api_tests.test_search_basic_query: PASS - Returns hits with metadata for 'birthday'
backend_api_tests.test_search_pagination: PASS - offset parameter returns different results
backend_api_tests.test_reindex_with_valid_credentials: PASS - Returns success with admin credentials

frontend_ui_tests.search_bar_visibility: PASS - Search icon in navbar opens search overlay
frontend_ui_tests.typeahead_dropdown: PASS - Shows 8 products and 4 collections for 'cake'
frontend_ui_tests.search_results_page: PASS - Shows 177 results for 'cake' with product grid
